form.formComment: Resumes racing after a long spell. Only one run when second last of 7 at Ripon on August 25 over 2000m, 23 len behind Final Secret with 57kg at $81. Others look better.

form.formComment: Resuming from a lengthy break. Only one run when made some head-way from midfield; 4th of 15 at Newmarket (Rowley) on October 31 over 1400m, 4.5 len behind Yazin carrying 58kg at $151. Open to plenty of improvement.

form.formComment: Racing first-up today. Finished off last campaign third of 10 at Newcastle All Weather November 26 over 1600m, 2.25 len behind Emma's Letter with 60.5kg at $7. On debut fourth of 9 at Newcastle All Weather November 7 over 1400m, 17 len behind We're Goosers carrying 60.5kg at $19. Progressive and expected to measure up.

form.formComment: Had two starts to date. At debut, second last of 7 at Chelmsford on March 12 over 1600m, 20 len behind Tamashal carrying 56kg at $13. Second-up 3rd of 9 at Southwell All Weather on March 21 over 1600m, 2.75 len behind Welbury with 56.5kg at $34. Promising type who is among the leading chances.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four-and-a-half months break. Finished off last preparation seventh of 10 at Newcastle All Weather November 22 over 1400m, 12 len behind Aqua Bear with 59.5kg at $67. On debut second last of 9 at Redcar October 17 over 1600m, 13 len behind Beyond The Bar carrying 59.5kg at $51. Will benefit from that race experience so worth considering.

form.formComment: First-starter by Far Above out of Pepinillo. Tough to line up. Profiles nicely and is worth keeping safe.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First-starter by Far Above out of Pepinillo. Tough to line up. Profiles nicely and is worth keeping safe.

form.formComment: Raced twice to date. At big odds at debut, 10th of 12 at Kempton Park All Weather on February 18 over 1400m, 19 len behind Comic Hero carrying 52kg at $26. Second-up ran last in a small field at Wolverhampton on March 2 over 1400m, 13 len behind Pints In Peace carrying 52.5kg at $101. Look elsewhere.

form.formComment: Third race start. First start 3rd of 7 at Newcastle All Weather on November 22 over 1400m, 2 len behind Darn Hot Gallop with 57kg at $41. Returned from break 6th of 9 at Newcastle All Weather on March 12 over 1400m, 7 len behind Henry Halflight with 55kg at $6.50. Rates highly and can do much better this time.
